title: Police and Fire Budget Audit Resolution
summary: Councilor Donna Moore introduces item 40, a resolution requesting the city auditor conduct an independent budget review of police and fire departments within 3 weeks using existing resources. Council clarifies this is not an RFP for external audit -- the auditor will use in-house staff. Brief debate about scope; at least one councilor declines to co-sponsor. Councilor Williams asks about RFP implications; confirmed auditor uses existing resources only.

political_signal.description: Council requesting budget audit of police and fire departments -- not unanimous support

processing_notes: Resolution uses auditor's existing resources, not external RFP. At least one councilor declines to co-sponsor. 3-week timeline requested.
